name: @uptimizr/babylon-lite
description: Babylon Lite (@babylonjs/lite) connector for Uptimizr — captures camera, pointer, mesh, and perf events from the functional/WebGPU Babylon engine as an sdk-core collector.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm run bundle && pnpm run bundle:global
scripts.bundle: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --target=es2022 --external:@babylonjs/lite --minify --legal-comments=none --banner:js="/* @uptimizr/babylon-lite standalone bundle — Apache-2.0. Async-import into any page that already runs @babylonjs/lite; lite stays external (peer dependency, never bundled). */" --outfile=dist/uptimizr-babylon-lite.js
scripts.bundle:global: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=iife --global-name=Uptimizr --platform=browser --target=es2022 --external:@babylonjs/lite --minify --legal-comments=none --banner:js="/* @uptimizr/babylon-lite standalone bundle (global) — Apache-2.0. Inject via a <script> tag into a page that runs @babylonjs/lite; exposes window.Uptimizr. lite stays external (peer dependency, never bundled). */" --outfile=dist/uptimizr-babylon-lite.global.js
